chapter_title.en: Reward of uttering a Name of Allah while performing ablution

text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ مُعَاوِیَهَ بْنِ حُکَیْمٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْمُغِیرَهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُسْکَانَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ ذَکَرَ اللَّهَ عَلَی وُضُوئِهِ فَکَأَنَّمَا اغْتَسَلَ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 2. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Muawiyah b. Hakeem from Abdillah b. al-Mughira from Abdillah b. Muskan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “A person who utters the name of Allah while performing ablution is like one who has performed a Ghusl.”
